examples: Rupert Everett played a snooty, dandyish Holmes with a taste for cutting put-downs in the 2004 BBC film Sherlock Holmes and the Case of the Silk Stocking.
Ed WESTWICK the Brit export star of Gossip Girl does dandyish excess on set and shows Manhattanites how to do rock-edged minimal elegance on the red carpet.
His mannerist, almost dandyish, style has led serious people to make this same misjudgment.
